markdown:
#  Edit a Drawing Area 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can only edit the name and description of a drawing area. If you want to edit drawings within a drawing area, see [Edit Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/edit-drawings).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Drawing Areas** page if you are already in a drawing area.  
_Note:_ Each area will be displayed with the name of the area, when the area was updated and created, and how many drawings are in the area.
  3. Click the gear ![Icon Settings Gear Grey](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d651ae1e759a4006d989865fe93a0703/c5de24f60e608c6628a50f5ac5356031/icon-settings-gear-grey.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon on the drawing area you want to edit.
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Edit the drawing area name or description.
  6. Click **Update**.


## See Also
  * [Enable or Disable Drawing Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-drawing-areas)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Move Drawings to Another Drawing Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/move-drawings-to-another-drawing-area)
title: Edit a Drawing Area
description: To edit the name or description of a drawing area in the project's Drawings tool.
